entry.title: New: RES25-163 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF THE LOAN OF TWO (2) REFRIGERATED CONTAINERS, CHASSIS, AND MOTOR GENERATORS, VALUED AT $1,430, FROM MATSON NAVIGATION COMPANY FOR REFRIGERATION OF WREATHS AND LEI FOR THE MAYOR'S MEMORIAL DAY CEREMONY AT THE NATIONAL CEMETERY OF THE PACIFIC AT PUOWAINA ON MAY 26, 2025.

Latest action: Adopted.

View on the council site
